title: Sleeper pod
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''sleeper pod''' was one of the earliest known [[Starship/Legends|spaceships]] capable of interstellar flight. Constructed on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] even before the establishment of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], ships of this type were equipped with basic chemical drives, were probably only capable of [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] speeds, and had equipment to maintain their passengers in [[Wikipedia:Cryonics|cryogenic]] hibernation.

At least one sleeper pod survived until the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]: one of several ships and vehicles placed by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] within the [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] storehouse, it was placed within a [[Hangar Bay|display hangar]] deep inside the mountain, one of the few areas to survive the destruction of the base in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], and it was recovered intact by the New Republic [[Xenoarchaeology/Legends|xenoarchaeology]] team led by [[Garv Debble]].
